contexts.name: build-system
ubiquitous_language: Quality / Build Site / Deploy to GitHub Pages (3 GH Actions job names)
inbound_commands: mise run {dev, build, preview, lint, lint:fix, format, format:check, clean, deploy, ci}
npm direct invocations (e.g., npm run build)
git push to main (triggers GH Actions quality → build → deploy)
git push to a PR branch (triggers quality + build, NOT deploy)
workflow_dispatch (manual GH Actions trigger per deploy.yml:8)
outbound_events: dist/ artifact (Vite build output; consumed by actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3)
Biome-format side effects on .js/.json/.css (consumed by .claude/settings.json PostToolUse hook in agent-governance context)
external_dependencies: 5 third-party GitHub Actions @v4 (AAF-VGH-010 — unpinned to SHA; supply-chain note for Phase 6)
produced_contracts: 3 GH Actions job names ('Code Quality', 'Build Site', 'Deploy to GitHub Pages') — consumed by GH UI + (external) branch protection rules per AAF-VGH-011

citations.evidence: Biome lint + format config; 2 rules at 'warn' (AAF-VGH-003)
3-job pipeline: Code Quality → Build Site → Deploy to GitHub Pages; deploy gated on PR=false; id-token:write + pages:write
Ask-first protection list includes 4 build-system files

jq (referenced in the PostToolUse hook command at .claude/settings.json:33)

assets_split.question: Should assets/ split into its own context (design-system-assets)?
assets_split.rationale: Same authority basis (deployed pages as artifact), same owner, same lifecycle. The design-system *vocabulary* drift is a Phase 1 collision, not a Phase 2 split trigger.

deploy_yml_split.question: Should .github/workflows/deploy.yml be its own context (ci-cd)?
deploy_yml_split.rationale: Ask-first protection at AGENTS.md:101 treats it as a peer to vite.config.js. The deploy-job elevated permissions (pages:write + id-token:write) are a Phase 6 principal-level boundary inside build-system, not a context split.

experiments_sandbox_status.question: Is experiments-sandbox a real bounded context, or a §6.3 'non-context working directory'?
experiments_sandbox_status.answer: Confirmed as a real bounded context
experiments_sandbox_status.rationale: Has explicit authority basis (stateless-policy via exclusion rules in biome.json + vite.config.js + cursor rules), distinct lifecycle declaration ('safe to prototype freely'), identifiable consumers (manual artifact promotion to portfolio-pages; cross-reference from THEMES.md in agent-governance), and 5 evidence types cleared. NOT a §6.3 non-context.

maat_collision_route.question: Does MAAT-related vocabulary show as a collision in Phase 1 (operator-positioning vs site-content)?
maat_collision_route.rationale: 12 maat_feather favicon refs + 8 textual MAAT refs verified at HEAD. Phase 1 records the collision; Phase 8 will judge.
